name: forge-plugins
description: Forge AI development system — consolidated 4-plugin package (core/knowledge/build/design) + forge-game (Unity, 별도).

plugins.name: forge-core
plugins.description: Forge 시스템 핵심 — 세션관리·cr-multi·rag-search·advisor + 하네스 정리(legacy-scan/diet/sweep/drift) + 감사(system-audit 6축·ACHCE 5축·migration-audit). 통합 공통 기반.

plugins.name: forge-knowledge
plugins.description: Forge 지식·리서치 — learn/memory-manage/wiki-sync/rag-search + article/yt/site-deep-analyze. forge-tools MCP(ADR-174 unified_search).

plugins.name: forge-build
plugins.description: Forge 제품 생성 파이프라인 — 기획(spec-write/writing-plans/requirements-clarity/autoplan) + 구현·검증(qa/healer/investigate/api-e2e/forge-fix/보안·성능·UI). SDD 본류.

plugins.name: forge-game
plugins.description: Forge 게임팩 — gdd/game-qa/game-asset-pipeline/asset-extract (Unity 전용). 통합 미포함·별도 유지.
